mapper.select: select u.id, u.email, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.create_time as createTime, coalesce(sum(case when c.type = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as planToWatch, coalesce(sum(case when c.type = 2 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as watched, coalesce(sum(case when c.type = 3 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as watching, coalesce(sum(case when c.type = 4 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as onHold, coalesce(sum(case when c.type = 5 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as abandoned from user u left join user_bgm_collection c on c.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId} group by u.id, u.email, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.create_time
